## Description
Describe the changes introduced by this pull request and the rationale behind them. Include context-aware explanations of any design alterations or refactoring.

Fixes # (issue reference)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (README, templates, guides)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have verified database migrations using Alembic (if database models changed).
- [ ] I have tested all roles (Admin, Doctor, Nurse, ICU Manager) locally.
- [ ] My changes build cleanly in Vite (`npm run build`).
- [ ] The FastAPI test suite runs successfully.
- [ ] I have removed all temporary logging and debug print statements.
